title: Hardcore Frozen Apocalypse
description: Survive an endless winter. Food is scarce, caves are cruel, and the surface is stalked by the frozen dead. This pack blends chilly survival with exploration and light automation—perfect for hardcore worlds and co-op runs.
body:
What’s inside

- Frozen survival theme: New frozen threats and frigid ambience to keep every venture risky and rewarding.
  
- Exploration & structures: YUNG’s Better Strongholds, Mineshafts, and Cave Biomes overhaul the underground; discover Underground Bunkers, Underground Villages, and the ominous Frozen Zombie Castle while you scavenge for supplies.
  
- Light automation & utilities: Create (Fabric) lets you bootstrap contraptions to process resources and stabilize your base. Waystones streamline travel, and Sophisticated Backpacks keeps your kit organized.
  
- Combat & clarity: Better Combat upgrades melee feel; JEI and Jade keep recipes and block info at your fingertips; AppleSkin, Inventory Profiles Next, Controlling, and Searchables polish the moment-to-moment experience.
  
- Atmosphere: Sound Physics Remastered and Visuality add crunchy, wintry immersion. Iris is included with curated shaderpacks (Snowimagined, Rethinking Voxels) and two bundled resource packs (Mandala Utopia + GUI Darkmode) for a crisp, icy look out of the box.
  
- Multiplayer-ready: Simple Voice Chat for proximity chat, Hardcore Revival for downed-ally rescues, and No Chat Reports for private servers.
  
- Performance by default: Sodium, Indium, Sodium Extra, FerriteCore, ModernFix, and Spark are pre-tuned so you can play smoothly without tweaking.

Recommended playstyle

- Hardcore or semi-hardcore. Scout carefully, settle near underground networks, and push outward once you’re geared.
  
- Explore to progress. Bunkers, villages, and reworked dungeons are your lifelines to better loot and safer routes.
  
- Automate smartly. Use Create for resource processing and survival QoL as you carve out a thawed refuge below the ice.
